title: Targeting Transferrin Receptor to Transport Antisense Oligonucleotides Across the Blood-Brain Barrier
author: Barker, Scarlett
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is a repository that houses the code used to generate the analyses and figures in Barker & Thayer et al, 2023. Code will reference files that can either be obtained from GEO submissions GSE201741, GSE201787, and GSE208114, found in the inst/extdata directory or generated within the analysis code itself.
steps_raw: This is a repository that houses the code used to generate the analyses and figures in Barker & Thayer et al, 2023. Code will reference files that can either be obtained from GEO submissions GSE201741, GSE201787, and GSE208114, found in the inst/extdata directory or generated within the analysis code itself.
